title: BSNL Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: BSNL Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BSNL Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
